title: Ashen + [Let's Do] Hearth & Timber Compat
description: A compatibility resource pack between Ashen 16x and [Let's Do] Hearth & Timber
body:
Want to play [Ashen](https://modrinth.com/project/LSmohupN) with [[Let's Do] Hearth & Timber](https://modrinth.com/project/paO4gjmE)? Tired of certain blocks and items using vanilla textures and looking out of place with Ashen? Then this add-on is for you!

Place this pack _above_ Ashen in your load order.

<details>
<summary>Included textures:</summary>

- All wood types + terracotta for beams, boards, railings, supports, pillars, window casings, glass panes, windows, and sliding barn doors
- Variants for all wood types + terracotta shingles (blocks, stairs, and slabs)
- Splitstone path
- Mossy splitstone and mossy splitstone path
- Thatch, all types
- Framework
- Timber frames, all types

</details>

<hr/>

**Credits to:**
- [Aim_Boot](https://modrinth.com/user/vglxcci2) for the amazing [Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/project/LSmohupN) resource pack
- [satisfyu](https://modrinth.com/user/u5d114le) for the super cozy [[Let's Do] Hearth & Timber](https://modrinth.com/project/paO4gjmE) mod

<hr/>

❗For any issues, questions, or suggestions regarding this add-on, please contact me through my email bunofthesun@gmail.com or drop me a message on the official [Ashen Discord](https://discord.gg/k5pDjKbhdh) @carrotsandsoup.
